events.name: Denver Broncos at New York Jets

headlines.description: — It seemed every time Patrick Surtain II looked, his Denver Broncos teammates were sacking Justin Fields.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos get 9 sacks and beat the winless Jets in ugly 13-11 victory in London

headlines.description: — It was Jonathan Taylor running the ball and Daniel Jones making crucial plays at big moments.
headlines.shortLinkText: Daniel Jones throws for 2 touchdowns as the Colts rally past the Cardinals for a 31-27 win

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — Jim Harbaugh will never forget the sequence.
headlines.shortLinkText: Justin Herbert rallies the Chargers in the final minute for a 29-27 win over the Dolphins

events.name: New England Patriots at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Louisiana native Kayshon Boutte bought 40 tickets for New England's visit to New Orleans and the former LSU receiver got his money's worth.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maye throws 3 TD passes and the Patriots hold on to beat the Saints 25-19

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers knows the Pittsburgh Steelers are hardly a finished product five games into the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aaron Rodgers throws for 2 TDs as Steelers continue home dominance of Browns in 23-9 win

headlines.description: — Rico Dowdle warned his former Dallas Cowboys teammates last week they'd better get ready and buckle up.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dowdle has 239 yards from scrimmage vs. former team as Panthers beat Cowboys on FG as time expires

headlines.description: — Having thrown a combined six interceptions in his last two starts in Jacksonville, Sam Darnold refused to get greedy this time around.
headlines.shortLinkText: Darnold, Smith-Njigba and defense carry Seahawks to 20-12 victory at Jaguars

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Baltimore Ravens

headlines.description: — The first half was the stuff of nightmares for the Los Angeles Rams: penalties, poor kicking, a turnover and even an injury to star receiver Puka Nacua.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rams stuff the Lamar Jackson-less Ravens 17-3, dropping Baltimore to 1-5

events.name: Tennessee Titans at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — It was Devin White and Maxx Crosby and Jonah Laulu and seemingly every defender wearing Raiders silver and black.
headlines.shortLinkText: The Raiders end a 4-game skid by dominating on defense to beat the Titans 20-10

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — This time, the Green Bay Packers built a double-digit lead and finished the job.
headlines.shortLinkText: Packers overcome Flacco's comeback attempt and beat the Bengals 27-18

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Baker Mayfield shrugged off the “MVP!” chants the way he shook away from tacklers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Baker Mayfield tosses 2 touchdown passes and the Buccaneers beat the 49ers 30-19

events.name: Detroit Lions at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs knew they were going to have a fight on their hands when the Detroit Lions, riding a four-game winning streak and a whole bunch of momentum, rolled into Arrowhead Stadium on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes leads the Chiefs to a 30-17 victory over Lions, and a fistfight erupts at the finish
